policy.description: Foundry MAY run registry-approved idempotent retries and prepare tasks/PRs. Foundry MUST NOT change editorial claims, ranking, sources, rate limits, data schemas, or production deployment without explicit human approval.

safeActions.verification: git diff --stat apps/web/src/data/daily-source-refreshes.json shows expected date; pnpm daily-automation:test passes
safeActions.sideEffects: writes apps/web/src/data/daily-source-refreshes.json (committed by operator or personal-brief cron)

safeActions.idempotency: market_quotes hour-bucket id dedupes; artifact overwrite
safeActions.verification: git diff --stat apps/web/src/data/market-refreshes.json; pnpm market-snapshot:test passes

safeActions.idempotency: INSERT OR REPLACE on signals table; signals/*.md is canonical
safeActions.verification: wrangler d1 execute --remote --command 'SELECT count(*) FROM signals WHERE review_status=\'published\'' matches signals/*.md count
safeActions.sideEffects: writes D1 signals table (no markdown mutation)

safeActions.idempotency: deterministic replay over events+signals; overwrites label-backtest.json
safeActions.verification: git diff workers/api/src/lib/label-backtest.json is non-empty and matches expected label set
exit 0 and report has no blocking gaps (or names accepted exceptions)
exit 0; snapshot passes sanitization test (no secrets, no content bodies)

forbiddenActions.description: Edit a published signal's claims, entities, direction, or confidence
forbiddenActions.reason: Signals are append-only (ADR-002). Supersede with a new file citing the prior.
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Author a new signals/YYYY-MM-DD/<slug>.md citing the prior slug; sync via pnpm signals:sync:remote

forbiddenActions.description: Modify the auto-publish rubric weights, hit-rate ledger, or convergence label definitions without a human-approved PR
forbiddenActions.reason: Ranking changes affect public hit-rate ledger and editorial positioning.
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Open a PR with the rule change + unit test update; human review and merge

forbiddenActions.description: Register a new ingest source adapter or change source coverage scope
forbiddenActions.reason: Source scope is a product-direction decision (docs/product/direction.md).
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Open a PR updating source-catalog.md + source-coverage.md; human review

forbiddenActions.description: Tighten or loosen provider rate limits, concurrency caps, or retry budgets
forbiddenActions.reason: Rate-limit changes can starve or flood providers; proposal explicitly forbids.
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Open a PR with the limit change + rationale; human review

forbiddenActions.description: Apply a D1 migration to production (db:migrate:remote) or add a new migration file as part of an automation change
forbiddenActions.reason: Schema migrations are production mutations; proposal explicitly forbids.
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Separate PR with migration + meta update; operator applies remotely after review

forbiddenActions.description: Trigger deploy-web.yml or deploy-api.yml via workflow_dispatch from an automation context
forbiddenActions.reason: Production deploys are human-approved; auto-on-push is the only non-human trigger.
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Operator triggers deploy manually, or pushes to main after CI passes

forbiddenActions.description: Rotate, add, or remove GitHub Actions secrets, Cloudflare API tokens, or provider API keys
forbiddenActions.reason: Credential changes are operator-only; AGENTS.md hard rule.
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Operator updates secrets in GitHub/Cloudflare dashboards

forbiddenActions.description: Modify DNS records, custom domains, or Cloudflare zone config
forbiddenActions.reason: DNS changes can break the public surface; operator-only.

forbiddenActions.description: DELETE, UPDATE, or bulk-INSERT into D1 tables outside the registry-approved safe actions
forbiddenActions.reason: Foundry must not mutate production data without approval.
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Open a PR proposing the mutation with rollback plan; operator review

forbiddenActions.description: Publish a new public claim, marketing asset, or changelog entry without human review
forbiddenActions.reason: Public claims are human-approved; AGENTS.md hard rule.
forbiddenActions.correctProcess: Open a PR with the claim; human review and merge
